    - ~i (1 range)

    - |i (1 line)  
    - @e (1 line)  
    - raa (1 range)  
    - copy (1 line)  
    - Ae (1 line)
    - Ai (1 range)
    - Ee (1 line + 1 range)
    - Ei (1 line)
  - <line_refs>: Must be comma-separated line numbers or ranges. Ranges denote subproofs (e.g., `->i 8-12`, `|e 4, 5-9, 10-14`)

- | = disjunction (or) 
- ~ = negation (not)

    Ax represents ∀x  
    Ex represents ∃x
